problem id: a2eb7c6f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(3)

examples:
  01001100 -> 00001001
  00001000 -> 00000001
  00011001 -> 00000011
  11001110 -> 00011001
  11000111 -> 00011000
  10010001 -> 00010010
  10000011 -> 00010000
  00110001 -> 00000110

query: 01101101
predicted answer: 00001101
